title: After the Debut: Our First Goal!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unintimidated by the pressure of the Twinkle
Series, Matikanetannhauser finishes her debut
race with a big smile and declares that she had a
lot of fun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After seeing Matikanetannhauser's brilliant run,
the spectators begin wondering how she sizes up
against Mihono Bourbon, who just recently made
a big splash at her own debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After returning to campus, we make winning the
Classic Triple Crown our goal for her classic year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our first goal is to come in fifth place or higher in
a G1 race!
